progress_summary: Fourth bug-check run on this project. Diff is the flag-audit branch (claude/audit-feature-flags-JD8Rp): src/lib/flags/registry.js, src/index.js, src/lib/analytics.js, and 9 site/ files (Header, Footer, ConsentBanner, build-defaults helpers, demo/index/install/skills/[id]/skills/index pages). Ran the full check suite: vitest (15 files, 108/108 passed), astro check (0 errors, 0 warnings — pre-existing 'ortho' / dead-var warnings in architecture.astro line 1010+ unrelated to this diff), worker build green via npm run build, anti-pattern grep (the only console.log hits are pre-existing in src/lib/request-id.js's structured logger; no debugger / .only / @ts-ignore / empty catch in staged diff), secret scan clean. Verdict PASS.

key_decisions: Source-touching commit — ran the full applicable check suite (tests, build, type-check, anti-patterns, secrets).
ESLint skipped because the repo has no eslint config; relying on astro check and tsc-via-astro for type/lint signal.
npm audit skipped because the diff doesn't change package.json or lockfiles.
The two console.log hits in src/lib/request-id.js are the structured logger implementation (pre-existing on main), not introduced by this branch.

next_actions: If a future commit changes package.json or package-lock.json, run npm audit --audit-level=critical as part of bug-check.
If eslint config is added to the repo, wire it into bug-check's lint step.

notes: astro check: 0 errors, 0 warnings (9 pre-existing hints in architecture.astro unrelated to this branch).
anti-patterns: 2 console.log hits in src/lib/request-id.js (structured logger, pre-existing); no debugger / .only / @ts-ignore / empty catch in staged diff.
secrets: clean (no API key, AWS, private-key, or service-prefix matches).
build: npm run build green (esbuild + 25-page Astro build).
lint and dependency-vuln scans skipped (no eslint script in package.json; npm audit not gating).
